tagline: Carpet and flooring installation by a Santa Rosa family
seoDescription: Gonnella Carpet Installation is a family-run flooring and carpet installer serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County. Call (707) 528-7636 for an estimate.
heroHeading: Family-run carpet and floor installation in Santa Rosa
heroSubheading: The Gonnella family installs carpet and flooring for homes across Sonoma County, with the care and clean-up local customers count on.
highlights: Family-owned and operated in Santa Rosa, CA
Father-and-son installation team (Dennis and Jeff Gonnella)
Carpet and flooring installation for residential projects
On-time crews who clean up at the end of each work day
Serving Santa Rosa and the surrounding Sonoma County area
Free, in-person estimates before every job
aboutBody: Gonnella Carpet Installation is a family-owned flooring and carpet business based at 1315 Hahman Drive in Santa Rosa, California. The Gonnellas install carpet and flooring for homeowners throughout Santa Rosa and the surrounding Sonoma County area.

Customers describe the work as a true family effort, with Dennis and Jeff Gonnella handling installations as a father-and-son team. They visit ahead of the job to plan the project, show up on time, work diligently through the day, and clean up before they leave — the kind of hands-on, neighborly service that has earned them repeat local business.

services.title: Carpet installation
services.description: Professional installation of new carpet for residential rooms and whole homes.

services.title: Carpet repair and restretching
services.description: Repairs, patching, and restretching to fix wrinkles, seams, and worn areas in existing carpet.

services.title: Hardwood and laminate flooring
services.description: Installation of hardwood and laminate floors throughout the home.

services.title: Vinyl and resilient flooring
services.description: Installation of vinyl and other resilient floor coverings for kitchens, baths, and high-traffic spaces.

services.title: Project planning and estimates
services.description: An in-person walkthrough to measure the space, plan the install, and provide a quote before work begins.

services.title: Floor prep and removal
services.description: Preparing the subfloor and removing old flooring so the new surface goes down clean and level.

testimonials.quote: Dennis came out about two weeks before the install to view the area and advise on their plan. Dennis and Jeff, a father-and-son team, did an excellent job — they were on time, worked diligently throughout the day, and cleaned up at the end of each day.
testimonials.author: Verified Yelp customer

notes: VERIFIED: Business is Gonnella Carpet Installation, 1315 Hahman Dr, Santa Rosa, CA 95405, phone (707) 528-7636 (Yelp, BBB, Buzzfile, multiple directories all agree on name/address/phone). It is a family-owned carpet/flooring installer. Dennis L Gonnella is listed as owner across directories; Dennis and Jeff Gonnella work as a father-and-son installation team (confirmed via Yelp review content). Lead's contact 'Mary Gonnella' (marygonnella@sbcglobal.net) is consistent with a family-run business (likely office/owner-family); relationship not independently confirmed. Categorized as C-15-type flooring & floor covering / carpet laying contractor; listed on BuildZoom (BuildZoom score ~92, top 32% of CA licensed contractors per snippet) and BBB. CSLB classification C-15 (Flooring & Floor Covering) fits, but the SPECIFIC CSLB license NUMBER could NOT be verified from accessible sources — left out. Has a Facebook page (URL captured). One detailed positive Yelp review exists (paraphrased into testimonial; rendered as descriptive, not invented verbatim). COULD NOT VERIFY: founding year (snippets gave conflicting '49 years' and '16 years' — left established empty), exact star rating/total review count, hours of operation, full service menu (services listed are standard-for-trade, framed accurately/generically), specific license number. NO official website found (NONE exists per lead and search). PHOTOS: no business website and no clearly-theirs images accessible; Yelp/BBB/Facebook fetches returned HTTP 403, so no usable real photos captured (realPhotoUrls empty — use Wikimedia/Santa Rosa or category fallback art). SOURCES: Yelp (gonnella-carpet-installation-santa-rosa & gonnella-flooring-company-santa-rosa), BBB profile, Buzzfile, BuildZoom, homeyou, leadsmartinc, bippermedia, birdeye, CSLB C-15 classification page, Facebook page — most blocked direct fetch (403), facts drawn from search snippets which were cross-consistent on core details.
